headline: Workday Investor Activism Puts Governance And Valuation Debate In Focus
summary: Shareholders at Workday's upcoming annual meeting are set to vote on proposals calling for more detailed workforce demographic transparency and enhanced disclosure of shareholder voting by share class. Advocacy groups including As You Sow and the Office of the Comptroller of New York City are backing these measures, while Workday's management is urging investors to oppose them. For investors following NasdaqGS:WDAY, this governance debate adds a new dimension to a stock that has recently...
